attachments_parent_not_null.name: attachments_parent_not_null
attachments_parent_not_null.value: "attachments"."ticket_id" IS NOT NULL OR "attachments"."comment_id" IS NOT NULL

rules_trigger_mode_xor.name: rules_trigger_mode_xor
rules_trigger_mode_xor.value:
(
        ("rules"."schedule_cron" IS NULL AND coalesce(array_length("rules"."trigger_event_types", 1), 0) > 0)
        OR
        ("rules"."schedule_cron" IS NOT NULL AND coalesce(array_length("rules"."trigger_event_types", 1), 0) = 0)
      )

ticket_templates_schedule_mode_xor.name: ticket_templates_schedule_mode_xor
ticket_templates_schedule_mode_xor.value:
(
        ("ticket_templates"."schedule_cron" IS NOT NULL AND "ticket_templates"."trigger_at" IS NULL)
        OR
        ("ticket_templates"."schedule_cron" IS NULL AND "ticket_templates"."trigger_at" IS NOT NULL)
      )
